title: Euno - Cloud Logging queries (Sprint-1 OBS parity)
description: GCP multi-cloud parity for infra/sentinel/analytic-rules.json. These five log-based queries detect the same Sprint-1 OBS patterns as the Sentinel rules: denial spikes, write attempts under read-only mode, invalid-token bursts, kill-switch activation, and token-revocation spikes. Run them ad-hoc in the Logs Explorer, or use the companion Terraform module / `cloud-monitoring-alerts.tf` to materialize them as log-based metrics + alert policies.

queries.name: euno-deny-spike
queries.displayName: Capability denial spike from a single agent/session
queries.description: Five or more capability-token denials within five minutes from the same agent or session. Possible prompt-injection attempt or runaway agent loop.

queries.name: euno-write-in-readonly
queries.displayName: Write attempt from a read-only session
queries.description: An agent session that was issued only read scopes attempted a write operation. Indicates either a buggy agent or an active jailbreak attempt.
queries.filter:
resource.type="k8s_container"
jsonPayload.logType="audit"
jsonPayload.decision="deny"
jsonPayload.action=("write" OR "delete" OR "update" OR "create")
(jsonPayload.reason:"Insufficient permissions" OR jsonPayload.reason:"Invalid audience")

metric.name: euno/write_in_readonly
metric.description: Write attempt under a read-only session.

queries.name: euno-invalid-token-burst
queries.description: More than 20 invalid-signature or expired-token errors in a 5-minute window.
queries.filter:
resource.type="k8s_container"
(jsonPayload.message:"INVALID_TOKEN" OR jsonPayload.message:"EXPIRED_TOKEN" OR jsonPayload.message:"invalid signature")

queries.name: euno-kill-switch-activated
queries.description: Operational event: an admin activated the global, session-scoped, or agent-scoped kill switch.
queries.filter:
resource.type="k8s_container"
(jsonPayload.message:"Kill switch activated" OR jsonPayload.message:"KILL_ALL_AGENTS" OR jsonPayload.message:"kill switch enabled")

queries.name: euno-token-revocation-spike
queries.description: More than 10 token revocations through the admin API within 5 minutes.
queries.filter:
resource.type="k8s_container"
jsonPayload.message:"Token revoked via admin API"
